questions.question:

$$
f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{lc}
6 x(1-x), & 0<x<1 \\
0, & \text { ๅถไป }
\end{array},\right.
$$
$X_1, X_2, X_3, X_4, X_5$ ๆฏๆฅ่ช่ฏฅๆปไฝ็็ฎๅ้ๆบๆ ทๆ? ๆ ทๆฌๅๅผไธบ $\bar{X}$, ๅ?$D(\bar{X})=(\mathrm{)}$.
questions.analysis:
$D(\bar{X})=\frac{1}{n} D(X)$, ่
$$
\begin{aligned}
& E(X)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x f(x) d x=\int_0^1 6 x^2(1-x) d x=\frac{1}{2}, \\
& E\left(X^2\right)=\int_{-\infty}^{+\infty} x^2 f(x) d x=\int_0^1 6 x^3(1-x) d x=\frac{6}{20}, \\
& D(X)=E\left(X^2\right)-[E(X)]^2=\frac{1}{20} .
\end{aligned}
$$

ๆไป? $D(\bar{X})=\frac{\sigma^2}{n}=\frac{1}{100}$.

questions.question: ่ฎ?$X_1, \cdots, X_n$ ๆฏๆฅ่ชๆปไฝ $X$ ็ๆ ทๆ? $S^2=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2$, ๅ็ป่ฎบๆญฃ็กฎ็ๆ?( ).
questions.analysis:
ๅ ไธบ $\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2=\sum_{i=1}^n X_i^2-n \bar{X}^2, E(\bar{X})=E(X), D(\bar{X})=\frac{1}{n} D(X)$, ๆไปฅ
$$
\begin{aligned}
E\left[\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right] & =E\left(\sum_{i=1}^n X_i^2\right)-E\left(n \bar{X}^2\right)=n E\left(X^2\right)-n E\left(\bar{X}^2\right) \\
& =n\left[D(X)+[E(X)]^2-D(\bar{X})-[E(\bar{X})]^2\right] \\
& =(n-1) D(X) .
\end{aligned}
$$

ๆไป?$E\left(S^2\right)=D(X)$.
